chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH, CIRCUIT COURT HYDERABAD Cr. Bail Application No.S-755 of 2022 DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE(S) 1. For orders on office objections. 2. For hearing of main case. 30.09.2022. Applicant is present on ad-interim pre-arrest bail. Mr. Anwar Ali Rajput, Advocate for applicant. Mr. Rizwan Ahmed, Advocate a/w complainant. Ms. Sana Memon, Assistant P.G. O R D E R MUHAMMAD IQBAL KALHORO, J- Learned Counsel for both the parties submit that the parties have compromised and applicant has returned money to the complainant, therefore, complainant, who is also present, has no objection to the confirmation of bail. 2. Learned Assistant P.G has also extended no objection and in view thereof this bail application is allowed and ad-interim pre-arrest bail already granted to the applicant is hereby confirmed on same terms and conditions. JUDGE Shahid
